<!-- generated by build_memo.js from shared/corpus-index.jsonl — regenerate, don't hand-edit -->
Twenty-eight images now. The noon/golden-hour split stands at thirteen to fifteen, and noon's conversion advantage has not closed: nine of thirteen noon images score 2 or above, against six of fifteen for golden hour. When you choose golden hour, you are still more likely to produce atmosphere than structure.

The bougainvillea has appeared in ten images and is no longer an accident — it is furniture. Leave it alone entirely unless it arrives uninvited in a setting where it cannot be expected, which would restore the surprise it has spent. The jacaranda has held at four appearances across the full run. The feather's barring pattern in "Blank Authority, Rising Tide" remains the strongest ambient material accident in the sequence — forensic, specific, non-organic — and nothing since has matched its precision. The gate-shadow printing its geometry onto the forearm in "The Door That Opened Inward" is the closest successor: textural collision with conceptual consequence rather than organic residue softening the frame. That is still the direction.

Focal objects with designed or violated functions now number twelve, adding the diamond-mesh gate in "The Door That Opened Inward," whose function is reversed — it does not close a space, it inscribes a body. The hands-at-the-seam gesture from "Bearing Witness Together" remains the only time the violated instrument was a gesture rather than a thing, and it has still not been followed up.

Registers: aftermath eight, vigil seven, endurance five, defiance three, suspension three, menace two, and attrition now enters the count at one with "The Door That Opened Inward." Desecration, belated reckoning, cold methodical aftermath, and exhaustion each remain at one. Fury and interiority remain at zero across twenty-eight images.

Trace scores: the sequence closes 2, 1, 2, 1, 1, 2, 2, 1, 2, 2 — the single 3 now sits twenty-one images back and the work has not threatened it once. The two most recent scores are both 2, which is stable but not pressured. The gesturally dissolved focal object in "Bearing Witness Together" and the body-as-mapped-surface in "The Door That Opened Inward" are the two structural openings toward compression that a solitary anchoring object cannot reach, and neither has been developed into a deliberate method.

Twenty-eight images in, the work holds weight reliably and has not yet decided to ask for more.
